model._hint: Base: stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0. LoRA: artificialguybr/analogredmond-v2 (DreamBooth, fine-tuned on a large analog photo dataset, sponsored by Redmond.AI). creativeml-openrail-m license. ~6 GB SDXL + LoRA; sequential_cpu_offload recommended on ≤16 GB.

lora._hint: 0.9 default. 1.0 gives maximum analog effect. Model card notes multiple generations may be needed for good results.

generation._hint: 30–50 steps. 30 is a solid default. | CFG 5–9. 7.5 is a safe default. | SDXL native 1024×1024.

system._hint: ~6 GB peak; sequential_cpu_offload: enabled (required for large models)

notes.about: Generates images with the look of analog film photography — grain texture, warm tones, slight vignetting, and the imperfect charm of vintage camera shots.
notes.prompt_guide: TRIGGER WORD REQUIRED: 'AnalogRedmAF' must appear in the prompt. Style modifier tags: 'detailed', 'minimalist', 'colorful', 'black and white'. Examples: 'AnalogRedmAF portrait of a woman in a park, golden hour, film grain', 'AnalogRedmAF street photography, 1970s Tokyo, black and white', 'AnalogRedmAF close-up of wildflowers, soft bokeh, colorful'.
